title: RealCore TH
description: This is the ultimate modpack with over 100 mods, it's for great graphics with good performance and can be played with friends.
body:
## **Experience Minecraft Like Never Before!**

This modpack completely transforms your game with stunning, realistic visuals and high-end optimization—designed to run smoothly even on lower-end PCs. We’ve packed in essential quality-of-life improvements to refine everything from UI to core mechanics. Dive into overhauled combat, explore vast new horizons, and enjoy a seamless multiplayer experience with friends.


### ✨Key Features:


-  **Dynamic Physics**: Realistic cloth, hair, and environmental physics that bring the world to life.


-  **Premium Visuals**: Pre-loaded with Photon and Complementary Unbound shaders, paired with SPBR for the ultimate PBR texture experience.


- **Enhanced Navigation**: Never get lost again with Xaero’s Minimap and World Map providing a seamless way to track your journey.


- **Precision View**: Use Zoomify for a smooth, cinematic zoom to see distant horizons in perfect detail.


-  **Social Ready**: Features Simple Voice Chat for an immersive multiplayer experience.  What’s 


### 🆕New in the Latest Update?


- **Streamlined Performance**: We removed redundant mods to keep the pack lightweight and fast.

  
- **Enhanced Visuals**: Introducing AVPBR, a new PBR resource pack for incredible textures.

 
- **Zero Setup**: I’ve pre-configured the resource pack load order so you can jump straight in.


### ⚙️ Technical Details


- **Mod Loader**: Fabric
 
 
- **Optimization**: Includes top-tier performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore to ensure high FPS even on older PCs.


- **Pre-configured**: Shaders and Resource Packs are set up by default for the best "out of the box" experience.


**Note**: Be sure to check your settings and customize your keybinds to your liking! And if you want the AVPBR resource pack you will need to enable it by swapping it for SPBR.
